---
name: Feature request
about: Propose new product or engineering work
labels: [enhancement, triage]
---

## Problem

<!--
What user problem or engineering pain point motivates this?
Who experiences it and how often?
-->

## Proposed solution

<!--
A short description of what you'd build. Prefer "the simplest thing
that could possibly work" over a full architecture unless the scope
demands one.
-->

## Requirement / spec link

<!--
If this comes from a requirements doc, link the anchor:
  docs/specs/merism-platform/requirements.md#req-21
If it's a new requirement, spell it out here in EARS form:
  "When X happens, the system shall Y."
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Briefly list 1-2 alternatives and why you rejected them. -->

## Scope

- [ ] Backend model / migration
- [ ] Backend API or serializer
- [ ] Celery task / Celery-beat schedule
- [ ] Frontend Kea logic
- [ ] Frontend component / page
- [ ] Design-system token or primitive
- [ ] Documentation / ADR
- [ ] Infra / deployment / CI

## Risks

<!--
What could go wrong? Data migration concerns, LLM cost, rate limits,
participant-facing breaking change?
-->

## Open questions

<!-- Things you'd like reviewers to weigh in on before you start. -->
